theme_notes: Drawing from Trump's proposed 200% tariff on generic medicines (a major blow to Indian pharma exports), the 12th consecutive night of US airstrikes on Iran, France becoming the first EU country to ban social media for under-15s, Tropical Storm Bertha making landfall in Louisiana, and the Red Sox's record-tying 15-game winning streak being snapped by the Orioles.
settled: Even cleaner than US-Iran talks. Slightly more likely to hold.
Balanced like France's new social media law: strict, final, no exceptions.
The Red Sox ended their 15-game streak. You two ended yours.
youOwe: Less than the tariff on one aspirin. Still annoying.
Storm Bertha made landfall harder than this debt.
Even France's banned teenagers handle money better than you.
Generic drugs cost 200% more now. Your excuses cost 300%.
The Commonwealth Games opened in Glasgow. Your payment hasn't.
Red Sox broke a 15-game streak. You can't break one bad habit.
One bottle of Tylenol, post-tariff. You're the headache.
Bertha hit Louisiana and dissipated faster than your promises.
US strikes Iran for the 12th straight night. Your excuses run longer.
Houthi tankers move faster than your Venmo.
Bertha hit 7 states. This debt has hit every nerve.
Paramount and Warner Bros are merging $111B in goodwill. You've merged zero payments.
India's pharma sector is reeling from tariffs. So is your partner.
Night 12 of US airstrikes on Iran. Night whatever of you owing this.
France banned teens from TikTok AND you still haven't paid. One of these is fixable.
The Paramount-Warner Bros merger is $111 billion. You're inspiring things.
Trump put a 200% tariff on medicines. Your debt is its own chronic condition.
Even Iran is getting some nights off. You're giving your partner nothing.
theyOwe: Less than a post-tariff aspirin. Still a matter of principle.
Storm Bertha dissipated faster than their attention span.
France banned 14-year-olds from phones. Your partner has less financial maturity.
That's their post-tariff prescription budget. Healthy they are not.
Red Sox had 15 straight wins. They've had zero straight payments.
Commonwealth Games opened in Glasgow. Their repayment is still in the locker room.
Bertha made landfall and left cleaner than their repayment record.
The US is on night 12 of Iran strikes. You've been waiting longer for this.
India's pharma exports are tanking from tariffs. Your patience is tanking from this.
The Houthis seized two Saudi tankers today. Your partner seized your goodwill.
India lost billions over medicine tariffs. You lost your mind over this.
Storm Bertha got a FEMA declaration. This deserves the same urgency.
France banned kids from social media. Ban your partner from your Venmo.
Iran's getting hit for a 12th straight night. You've been stiffed longer.
Generic drugs are 200% more expensive. Collecting from them is 200% more exhausting.
The Paramount-Warner Bros deal is $111 billion. This is their warm-up act.
At 200% tariff rates, this buys half a pharmacy. You funded their whole lifestyle instead.
Night 12 of US airstrikes on Iran. This debt has its own escalation doctrine.
